intended_use: MammoScreen® BD is a software application intended for use with compatible full-field digital mammography and digital breast tomosynthesis systems. MammoScreen BD evaluates the breast tissue compositi
intended_use_full: MammoScreen® BD is a software application intended for use with compatible full-field digital mammography and digital breast tomosynthesis systems. MammoScreen BD evaluates the breast tissue composition to provide an ACR BI-RADS 5th Edition breast density category. The device is intended to be used in the population of asymptomatic women undergoing screening mammography who are at least 40 years old.
target_condition: Breast density assessment in screening mammography
ground_truth: Reference standard established by majority rule among assessment of 5 breast radiologists with at least 10 years of experience in breast imaging interpretation
other_metrics: Quadratically weighted Cohen's kappa for Hologic: 89.03 [95% CI: 87.43–90.56]; Quadratically weighted Cohen's kappa for Hologic Envision: 89.54 [95% CI: 86.88–91.69]; Quadratically weighted Cohen's kappa for GE: 93.19 [95% CI: 90.50–94.92]
